games.name: Seedfall: Defend the Last Tree
games.description: Seedfall is a 2D endless side-scroller where nature is your last weapon. Defend the final magical tree using coins to summon natural defenses, cast enchanted upgrades, and survive relentless waves of corrupted creatures. In the heart of a forgotten forest, humanity made a mistake. During an expedition in search of knowledge, a group of explorers uncovered an ancient bacteria hidden deep beneath the earth&amp;rsquo;s roots. What first appeared to be a scientific breakthrough soon turned into something far more powerful and far more dangerous.
games.instructions: Move A D or larr rarr Left Right Keys Interact Spend Coins S or darr Down Key PRESS THE P KEY TO RETURN TO THE MENU

games.name: DuaLight   A Reflected Game
games.description: DuaLight is a challenging 2D pixel art hyper-casual platformer. The true path lies in the reflection. Navigate levels where the real world tricks your eyes, and only those who watch the reflection below can move forward. Minimalist and short. In DuaLight &amp;ndash; A Reflected Game, nothing is as it seems&amp;hellip; or rather, everything only appears in the reflection. You control a character in a world where invisible platforms can&amp;rsquo;t be seen in the real world, but only in the reflection below the screen. You&amp;rsquo;ll encounter spikes and invisible platforms until you look at the reflection and realize the path was there all along.
games.instructions: Use the W A S D keys or the arrow keys to move Press W the up arrow or the spacebar to jump Press P to return to menu

games.description: Wordix is an engaging logic game where your task is to guess the word within a limited number of attempts. It&amp;rsquo;s the Russian version of the popular game Wordle, but with one important difference: the words are chosen from a pre-prepared list, and you can play as much as you want without waiting for a new word each day. The game develops your thinking skills, expands your vocabulary, and provides an entertaining way to spend time. It&amp;rsquo;s suitable for both children and adults. Simple rules make the game accessible to everyone, and color-coded hints help you find the correct answer faster.
games.instructions: Input Type letters or tap keys on the virtual keyboard Submit Press Enter to submit your guess Delete Use Backspace to erase a letter Hints Green correct letter and position Yellow correct letter wrong position Gray letter not in the word
